archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Approachable Tech OS

spacing_and_layout.container_customer_courier: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#F7F7FB] relative pb-24 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden
spacing_and_layout.container_merchant_admin: w-full min-h-screen bg-[#F7F7FB] flex flex-col md:flex-row

component_rules.buttons: Must be large and tappable. min-h-[56px] (14 units). Use primary (#6C3BFF) for main actions, accent (#00C2A8) for completed/success states.
component_rules.cards: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100. Must have clear visual hierarchy.
component_rules.category_chips: Horizontal scrollable flex container with hidden scrollbars. Chips should be pill-shaped (rounded-full), bg-white, active state uses primary border and text.
component_rules.bottom_navigation: Fixed bottom, high z-index (z-50), flex space-around, pb-safe-area. Icons with text-xs labels. Active state gets primary color.
component_rules.admin_sidebar: Desktop-first. Fixed width 250px (w-64), high contrast items, clear current state highlight.
component_rules.order_timeline: Vertical stepper layout using dots and connecting lines. #00C2A8 for completed, #6C3BFF for current.
component_rules.cart_badge: Absolute positioned on cart icon, rounded-full bg-[#00C2A8] text-white font-bold min-w-[20px] h-[20px] flex items-center justify-center text-[10px].

interactions_and_motion.haptic_feel: All primary actions and courier buttons must scale down (scale: 0.95) on active/tap. Use Framer Motion whileTap property.
interactions_and_motion.toast_notifications: Slide in from top center, bounce slightly. Used for New Order alerts in Merchant panel.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Minimal opacity fade. Fast response is key, avoid slow heavy animations.

image_urls.description: Stack of yellow shopping baskets (empty state)

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over #6C3BFF or #00C2A8 must be #FFFFFF to maintain WCAG AA compliance.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, nav items, chips, order cards) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='checkout-pay-now-button', data-testid='order-status-preparing').

instructions_to_main_agent.role_switcher: Implement a global top-bar (or fixed corner widget) visible at all times to switch between Customer, Merchant, Courier, and Admin contexts. This simulates the 4 independent apps.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_modes: For Customer and Courier routes, force a mobile-like max-width container (e.g. max-w-md mx-auto, shadow-2xl, relative, min-h-screen) to demonstrate the mobile-first nature of these roles. For Admin and Merchant, use full fluid layouts.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react icons exclusively. Ensure consistent stroke widths (usually 2).
instructions_to_main_agent.state_machine: Order flow is critical. Must build mock context/state to transition from Cart -> Created -> Paid -> Merchant Accepted -> Preparing -> Ready -> Courier Picked Up -> Delivered.
